ConfigMenu.Name: Roleplayr Connection
ConfigMenu.Label: Configure Roleplayr
ConfigMenu.Hint: Paste your Roleplayr API key and test the connection.

ApiKey.Name: API Key
ApiKey.Hint: Campaign-scoped Bearer token from Roleplayr campaign settings.

BaseUrl.Name: API Base URL
BaseUrl.Hint: Defaults to https://www.roleplayr.net — change only for local development.

ActorSync.Name: Sync Actor Changes to Roleplayr
ActorSync.Hint: When on, HP/XP changes on imported actors are written back to Roleplayr (debounced 2s).

CombatSync.Name: Stream Combat State to Player Portal
CombatSync.Hint: When on, combat tracker, party HP, and current scene are pushed live to the Roleplayr Player Portal.

PushSync.Name: Receive Pushes from Roleplayr
PushSync.Hint: When on, entities the DM pushes from the Roleplayr UI can be pulled into Foundry via the Pull from Roleplayr button or the game.gmantsRoleplayr.pullPushes() macro.

PushBackgroundPoll.Name: Background Pull Every 5 Minutes
PushBackgroundPoll.Hint: Safety net that automatically pulls pending pushes in case the DM forgets. Turn off to rely entirely on the manual Pull button or hotbar macro.

Config.Title: GMAnt's Roleplayr Integration
Config.ApiKeyHint: Generate from your Roleplayr campaign → Settings → Foundry VTT Integration. Keys start with rp_live_.
Config.BaseUrlHint: Leave as is for production. Only change for local Roleplayr development.

Import.Title: Import from Roleplayr
Import.Empty: No entities match the current filter in the bound campaign.
Import.SearchPlaceholder: Search by name, description, or tag...
